_publications._publicationTitle: Combined Inhibition of SHP2 and MEK Is Effective in Models of NF1-Deficient Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors
_publications._context: JH-2-009 showed intermediate single-agent sensitivity to RMC-4550 (SHP2i); combination with trametinib (MEKi) enhanced growth inhibition vs. either drug alone
